.metadata-container.background: rgba(240, 145, 111, 0.05) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.nav-files-container .tree-item.background: rgba(139, 168, 145, 0.12) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.status-bar.background: rgba(240, 145, 111, 0.2) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.view-content.background: rgb(40, 37, 32) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

a.external-link[data-tooltip-position=\".background: rgba(240, 145, 111, 0.08) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

a.footnote-backref.footnote-link.background: rgba(240, 145, 111, 0.08) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

a.internal-link.is-unresolved[data-href=.background: rgba(240, 145, 111, 0.08) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.is-selected.mod-complex.suggestion-i.background: rgba(240, 145, 111, 0.2) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-active.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(40, 37, 32) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-complex.suggestion-item.background: rgba(240, 145, 111, 0.2) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-left-split.mod-si.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-right-split.mod-s.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.multi-select-pill.background: rgba(240, 145, 111, 0.18) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.prompt.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.workspace-leaf.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

h1[data-heading=\"This is a heading 1\"].background: rgba(242, 168, 130, 0.2) linear-gradient(rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1), rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05)) repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

h2[data-heading=\"This is a heading 2\"].background: rgba(139, 168, 145, 0.2) linear-gradient(rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1), rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05)) repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

h3[data-heading=\"This is a heading 3\"].background: rgba(181, 168, 212, 0.2) linear-gradient(rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1), rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05)) repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

h4[data-heading=\"This is a heading 4\"].background: rgba(168, 196, 122, 0.2) linear-gradient(rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1), rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05)) repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

h5[data-heading=\"This is a heading 5\"].background: rgba(201, 122, 148, 0.2) linear-gradient(rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1), rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05)) repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

h6[data-heading=\"This is a heading 6\"].background: rgba(149, 179, 170, 0.2) linear-gradient(rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1), rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05)) repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

kbd.background: rgb(58, 56, 50) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

mark.background: rgb(90, 68, 48) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.background: rgb(58, 56, 50) linear-gradient(rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.35), rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.35)) repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.language-js.background: rgb(58, 56, 50) linear-gradient(rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.35), rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.35)) repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

tbody tr:nth-child(even).background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.03) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

th.background: rgb(226, 122, 90) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
